name: SAR Thermal Search Mission Preparation
description: You are the Pilot-in-Command for a county search and rescue drone team. A bushwalker has been reported missing in bushland south of Canberra. The Search and Rescue Operations Plan is at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/sar_operations_plan.txt. Prepare the drone for the thermal search survey in QGroundControl by completing ALL of the following: (1) In the Plan view, create a Survey mission for the search area. Configure the thermal camera with the exact specifications from Section 3 of the operations plan. Set the flight parameters from Section 4 including altitude, overlaps, hover-and-capture, and turnaround distance. Add a Rally Point at the emergency landing zone coordinates in Section 6. Save the mission to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/sar_thermal_survey.plan. (2) In Vehicle Setup > Parameters, configure the safety and navigation parameters from Section 5. Then export all parameters to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/sar_safety_params.params. (3) In Application Settings, configure the RTSP video source with the URL from Section 7. (4) Write a mission brief to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/sar_mission_brief.txt containing the mission name, camera model, survey altitude, rally point coordinates, RTSP URL, and confirmation that all safety parameters are configured. Do not launch the vehicle.
